---
title: "modelli_riccardo"
author: "Riccardo"
date: "2026-05-09"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, fig.align = 'center')
```


```{r}
pacman::p_load(foreign, tidyverse, forcats, survey, srvyr, lme4, lmerTest, knitr, 
               kableExtra, gt, gtsummary, scales, patchwork, ggeffects, palettes, choroplethr, choroplethrMaps)
options(survey.lonely.psu = "adjust")

df <- read.csv("brfss24_sub.csv")
```

Conversione a survey Obj
```{r}
brfss.design <- df %>%
  as_survey_design(
    ids = X_PSU,
    weights = X_LLCPWT,
    strata = X_STSTR,
    nest = TRUE
  )
```



```{r}
brfss.design %>%
  group_by(X_STATE) %>%
  summarise(
    n        = n(),                          # numero grezzo di interviste
    pop_est  = survey_total(vartype = NULL), # popolazione stimata rappresentata
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    prop = round((pop_est / sum(pop_est)) * 100, 2)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(pop_est))
```


```{r}

# Calcola la proporzione di mammografia per stato pesata
state_mam_weighted <- brfss.design %>%
  filter(!is.na(HADMAM), !is.na(X_STATE)) %>%
  group_by(X_STATE) %>%
  summarise(
    value = survey_mean(HADMAM == 1, na.rm = TRUE, vartype = "ci")
  ) %>%
  mutate(region = tolower(X_STATE))

nordest <- c("connecticut", "massachusetts",
             "rhode island", "vermont", "new hampshire",
             "maine")

# La mappa
choroplethr::state_choropleth(
  state_mam_weighted,
  title  = "Mammography participation by State",
  legend = "Proportion"
  )


```
## BMI value destribution by country (Weighted)

```{r}
ggplot(data = brfss.design) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(X_STATE, X_BMI5, weight = X_LLCPWT))


#ggplot(data = df %>% 
 # filter(X_STATE == "Maine")) +
  #geom_point(aes(x = X_BI))

```

```{r, include = FALSE}
# split per razza

brfss.design %>%
  filter(!is.na(X_STATE), !is.na(X_INCOMG1), !is.na(X_RACE)) %>%  # aggiungi X_RACE
  filter(!X_STATE %in% c("Guam", "Puerto Rico", "Virgin Islands")) %>%
  group_by(X_STATE, X_INCOMG1, X_RACE) %>%                          # aggiungi X_RACE
  summarise(pop = survey_total(vartype = NULL), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(X_STATE, X_RACE) %>%                                      # aggiungi X_RACE
  mutate(prop = pop / sum(pop)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    X_STATE = fct_reorder(
      X_STATE,
      ifelse(X_INCOMG1 == "200k+", prop, NA),
      .fun  = mean,
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = X_STATE, y = prop, fill = X_INCOMG1)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~ X_RACE, ncol = 2) +                                   # <- aggiunto
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "RdYlGn", direction = 1) +
  labs(
    title    = "Distribuzione del reddito per stato e per etnia",
    subtitle = "BRFSS 2024 — stime pesate",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Proporzione",
    fill     = "Fascia di reddito"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 8) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y     = element_text(size = 5),   # testo più piccolo perché i pannelli sono tanti
    axis.text.x     = element_text(size = 6),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    strip.text      = element_text(size = 7, face = "bold")  # titolo dei pannelli
  )
```




## Income distribuzione by state (Weighted)

```{r}
## split per stato

brfss.design %>%
  filter(!is.na(X_STATE), !is.na(X_INCOMG1), !is.na(X_RACE)) %>%
  group_by(X_STATE, X_RACE, X_INCOMG1) %>%
  summarise(pop = survey_total(vartype = NULL),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(X_STATE, X_RACE) %>%                        # proporzione dentro ogni stato x razza
  mutate(prop = pop / sum(pop)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = X_RACE, y = prop, fill = X_INCOMG1)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~ X_STATE, ncol = 3) +                    # facet per stato
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "RdYlGn", direction = 1) +
  labs(
    title    = "Distribuzione del reddito per razza — per stato",
    subtitle = "BRFSS 2024 — stime pesate. Proporzioni calcolate per razza dentro ogni stato",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Proporzione",
    fill     = "Fascia di reddito"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y     = element_text(size = 7),
    axis.text.x     = element_text(size = 6),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    strip.text      = element_text(size = 8, face = "bold")
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 2))
```


```{r, echo=FALSE,results='hide'}
brfss.design %>%
  filter(!is.na(X_RACE), !is.na(X_STATE)) %>%
  group_by(X_STATE, X_RACE) %>%
  summarise(
    n        = unweighted(n()),              # conteggio grezzo delle interviste
    pop_est  = survey_total(vartype = NULL), # stima della popolazione pesata
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(X_STATE) %>%
  mutate(prop = pop_est / sum(pop_est)) %>% # proporzione pesata per stato
  ungroup()
```

## Weighted Race per State

```{r}
brfss.design %>%
  filter(!is.na(X_RACE), !is.na(X_STATE)) %>%
  filter(!X_STATE %in% c("Guam", "Puerto Rico", "Virgin Islands")) %>%
  group_by(X_STATE, X_RACE) %>%
  summarise(pop_est = survey_total(vartype = NULL), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(X_STATE) %>%
  mutate(prop = pop_est / sum(pop_est)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(X_STATE = fct_reorder(
    X_STATE,
    ifelse(X_RACE == "Hispanic", prop, NA),
    .fun = mean, na.rm = TRUE
  )) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = X_RACE, y = X_STATE, fill = prop)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_text(aes(label = scales::percent(prop, accuracy = 1)),
            size = 2, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low    = "#fbf7f0",
    high   = "#8b1e3f",
    labels = scales::percent_format(),
    name   = "Proporzione"
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Composizione etnica per stato",
    subtitle = "BRFSS 2024 — stime pesate",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1, size = 7)
  )
```
